title: Amazon India Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Amazon India Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Amazon India Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Amazon India Digital Technologies:
Amazon India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India Digital Technologies!
